column1: # sync-classification.golden.tsv — the shared classification contract for the
# repo-sync ff-collision taxonomy. Read by BOTH the Go test
# test (~/bin/git-sync-classify_test.sh). A row that drifts in either impl
# fails its test, so the two classifiers cannot silently diverge.
#   tracked              — count of tracked (staged/unstaged) working-tree changes
#   ahead                — rev-list --count origin/<b>..HEAD (local commits not on origin)
#   behind               — rev-list --count HEAD..origin/<b> (origin commits not local)
#   untracked_collision  — 1 if an untracked file shadows an incoming tracked path, else 0
#   quarantine           — 1 if DOZOR_DEPLOY_SOURCE_SYNC_QUARANTINE / GIT_SYNC_QUARANTINE is on, else 0
#   expected             — the result label both impls must produce
# Decision order (load-bearing): tracked-dirty BEFORE diverged BEFORE up-to-date
